name: AMERICAN EXPRESS CO
summary: American Express is a global payments and premium lifestyle company founded in 1850 and headquartered in New York. It operates card-issuing, merchant-acquiring, and card network businesses offering credit and charge cards, banking products, travel and dining services, and expense management solutions to consumers, small businesses, mid-sized companies, and large corporations worldwide. For 2025, worldwide billed business was $1,670 billion with 86.6 million proprietary cards-in-force.
